title: selaginella biformis
intro: Selaginella biformis, also known as two-formed spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss in the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella biformis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
